nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Saltator
nodes.summary: Saltator（Saltator）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Buff-throated saltator、Black-winged saltator、Black-headed saltator等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Masked saltator
nodes.summary: The masked saltator (Saltator cinctus) is a species of passerine bird in the tanager family Thraupidae. It is found in southern Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru. The species is found in two small disjunct ranges, as well as smaller localized areas in Ecuador and Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, where it is threatened by habitat loss. References
